candidates.why: Direct match for total current assets on the balance sheet; reported total line with values.
Balancing line, not the reported total current assets.
Non-current assets, not current assets.

variables.notes: Use the populated total line, not the blank header or balancing item.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet match for cash and cash equivalents.
Component of cash, but less complete than the total cash and cash equivalents line.
Likely a component/subsplit rather than the main total, since it coexists with cash in hand & with banks.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at period end
candidates.why: Cash flow statement ending cash, but CHE should come from balance sheet when available.
Direct match for total current liabilities on the balance sheet.
Balancing line, not the reported total current liabilities.
Non-current liabilities, not current liabilities.

variables.notes: Selected the reported total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Clean current maturities of long-term debt excluding lease current portion; preferable to broader current portion line.
Direct short-term interest-bearing debt component.
Financing-related short-term debt; separate current borrowing component.
Contains current maturities but appears to include lease current portion, which baseline STD should exclude.

variables.notes: Used minimal non-lease current debt components. Avoided 'Current portion of non-current debt' because it appears to include lease current portion via separate lease line.

candidates.why: Best balance-sheet match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities; distinct from deferred tax liabilities.
Deferred taxes are non-current/non-payable in the TXP sense.
Tax asset, opposite of taxes payable.

variables.notes: Chosen outside shortlist; confident this is the current taxes payable-style liability, as deferred tax liabilities are listed separately.

candidates.why: Direct total/net PPE line and best match for PPEGT.
Only one PPE component, not total PPE.
Minor PPE component, not total PPE.

variables.notes: Preferred total net PPE line over individual tangible asset components.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets.

candidates.row_label: Net cash from operating activities Cash flow from investing activities
candidates.why: Despite concatenated wording, this row holds the operating cash flow total before the investing section starts.
Income statement-style operating profit, not cash flow from operations.

final_choice.row_label: Net cash from operating activities Cash flow from investing activities

variables.notes: The label is concatenated with the next section header, but the values clearly represent net cash from operating activities.
